assets.alt: JB Painters Interior Painting hero image
assets.prompt:
Create a photorealistic editorial image static landing page asset for JB Painters, a residential and commercial painting contractor.
Market and setting: New York, NY, Serving Manhattan and surrounding NYC areas, Manhattan.
Service focus: Interior Painting.
Use subtle visual influence from these brand colors: #428BCA, #0693E3, #FF6900, #FFFFFF.
Show paint rollers, brushes, painter tape, drop cloths, protected furniture, smooth prepared walls, crisp trim lines, ladders, plaster tools, and clean interior or exterior surfaces. Avoid messy spills and avoid showing fake company branding.
No readable text, no logos, no watermarks, no fake badges, no distorted hands, no surreal artifacts, no before/after split screen, no exaggerated disasters.
The image must be clean, commercially usable, high-end, and specific to this business niche rather than generic home services.
Composition: wide editorial hero image with clean negative space for copy overlay, premium natural light, professional but understated.
Required output aspect: 1536x1024.
